title: VJ's STYLE
description: A wonderfull resourcepack with simplistic textures and new 3d models
body:
### Have you ever dreamed of a texture pack that adds simplistic blocks, like trailers, unique custom 3D models, new features, and a whole host of other new things?

## **VJ's STYLE is here to fill your need!**

Enjoy an immersive gaming experience with **new user interfaces**, **new water colors**, **3D items**, new **3D plants**, **3D blocks**, and **much more**.

You can use BSL shaders to make your game look just like the photos :)

By using this texture pack, you'll enjoy all these new features easily, without downloading multiple texture packs...

Credits to JoseMan, VJelPRO127, and many more; you can see them inside the texture pack.

**ENJOY** THIS NEW EXPERIENCE AND WAY TO PLAY :)!

P.S.: THIS TEXTURE PACK IS NOT BARE BONES.

Use Continuity or Optifine for unlock some features that new end blocks or comnected glass.

Show me bugs and memes in the discord.
